title: key handle Drop leaks HSM cache slot silently
description: Any AesKey/EccP256Key/Ed25519Key/Curve25519Key/CmacKey/RsaKey/MlDsaKey dropped without calling evict() silently leaks a wolfHSM server-side RAM cache slot. When the cache fills, all subsequent HSM calls fail with a cryptic 'cache full' error. No Drop impl exists on any key type. This is the most likely recurring user issue: early-return on error, panic, or ? propagation in a closure all trigger it. Consequence: steady stream of 'my HSM calls stop working after N operations' issues. Fix: implement Drop that calls evict, or add a compile-time lint.
